response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role requires a Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Resume shows roughly 11 years of professional experience (post-2014), limited demonstrated AI/ML depth beyond recent MCP/agent tooling work at re:cinq, and no evidence of cloud-platform strategy, advising strategic customers, or building recognized AI products at scale. The seniority gap and lack of AI track record make this a misfit for a Principal/Director-level AI strategy position.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform deployed on Kubernetes, showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: Experience falls short of the 15-year requirement for the Director-level IC role
No recognized AI products, platforms, or publications demonstrating the required AI expertise
No evidence of cloud-strategy advisory work with strategic customers or executive-level influence

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI track record for Principal/Director AI strategy role
Seniority and scope mismatch versus Director-level IC expectations
Recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic tooling
